calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Fred Bryant, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ramon Sims.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 16, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice ot Pay Rent or Quit---------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Ramon Sims as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,645.26.
Holdover Damages - $558.62
Costs - $215.00.
Total - $2,418.88.

Additionally, plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 540 Jones, Street, #501, San Francisco, CA 94102. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Off Calendar
